name: Indeed Company Data Scraper & Summarization with Airtable, Bright Data and Google Gemini
description: Automated workflow: Indeed Company Data Scraper & Summarization with Airtable, Bright Data and Google Gemini. This workflow integrates 15 different services: stickyNote, httpRequest, markdown, wait, airtable. It contains 28 nodes and follows best practices for error handling and security.

Open the "Sticky Note1" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Perform Indeed Web Request" node (n8n-nodes-base.httpRequest) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Indeed Expert AI Agent" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Google Gemini Chat Model" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Markdown to Textual Data Extractor" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
